project.name: LLM Gateway
project.description: LLM API security proxy gateway — intercepts, scans, and audits all OpenAI-compatible API requests

archived_sprint.name: Admin Internationalization
archived_sprint.goal: Add full i18n support to admin dashboard with English and Chinese translations, enabling language switching via UI toggle

features.title: Setup i18n infrastructure
features.description: Install react-i18next and i18next packages. Create i18n configuration file with initialization. Set up translation file structure (locales/en/translation.json, locales/zh-CN/translation.json). Initialize i18next in main.tsx with language detection and fallback to English.
acceptance_criteria: react-i18next and i18next installed in apps/admin
i18n.ts config file created with proper initialization
Translation files created for en and zh-CN
i18next initialized in main.tsx before React renders
useTranslation hook works in components
features.technical_notes: Use i18next-browser-languagedetector for automatic language detection. Store preference in localStorage. Use 'en' as fallback language.

features.title: Translate core layout components
features.description: Add translations to Sidebar (nav labels), Navbar (logout button), and DataTable (pagination, empty message). Create translation keys for all hardcoded strings.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar nav items (Home, Keys, Audit, Security, Providers, Settings) use translation keys
Navbar logout button uses translation key
DataTable pagination (Page X of Y) uses translation keys
DataTable empty message uses translation key
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Use useTranslation hook in components. Follow i18next best practices with nested keys (e.g., 'nav.home', 'nav.keys').

features.title: Translate Login page
features.description: Add translations to LoginPage component including title, form labels, placeholder, button text, and error message.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'LLM Gateway Admin' translated
Label 'Admin Token' translated
Placeholder 'Enter admin token' translated
Button 'Sign In' translated
Error 'Token invalid' translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Use t() function for all user-visible text. Keep API error messages in English (technical).

features.title: Translate Overview page
features.description: Add translations to OverviewPage including KPI card labels, chart titles, table headers, and empty state message.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'Overview' translated
KPI labels (Total Requests, Token Usage, Total Cost, Avg Latency) translated
Chart titles (Requests by Model, Requests by Status, Recent Activity, PII Detection Rate) translated
Table headers (Time, Model, Tokens, Cost, Status) translated
'No recent activity' message translated
'of requests flagged' label translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Use nested keys like 'overview.kpis.totalRequests', 'overview.charts.byModel'. formatRelativeDate may need i18n-friendly alternative.

features.title: Translate Keys page and dialogs
features.description: Add translations to KeysPage, CreateKeyDialog, EditKeySheet, KeyDisplayDialog, and RevokeDialog. Includes table columns, form labels, buttons, and messages.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'API Keys' translated
Table headers (Name, Prefix, Rate Limits, Created, Status) translated
Status badges (Active, Revoked) translated
'Create Key' button translated
CreateDialog: title, labels, placeholders, buttons translated
EditSheet: title, labels, buttons translated
KeyDisplayDialog: title, copy instructions, buttons translated
RevokeDialog: title, confirmation message, buttons translated
'No keys found' message translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Rate limit abbreviations (RPM, TPM, RPD) can stay as-is (technical terms). Use nested keys like 'keys.table.name', 'keys.dialogs.create.title'.

features.title: Translate Audit page
features.description: Add translations to AuditPage including filter labels, table headers, export button, pagination, and empty state. Includes date picker placeholders.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'Audit Logs' translated
Filter labels (Start Date, End Date, Model, Status) translated
Date picker placeholder 'Pick a date' translated
Status filter options (All statuses, Success, Error, Blocked) translated
'All models' option translated
Table headers (Time, Request ID, Key, Model, Tokens, Cost, Latency, Status, PII, Injection) translated
'Export CSV' button translated
Pagination (Showing X-Y of Z, Previous, Next, Page X of Y) translated
'No audit logs found' message translated
Export error/warning messages translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Use nested keys like 'audit.filters.startDate', 'audit.table.time'. Calendar component from shadcn may need locale prop.

features.title: Translate Detail Drawer and JSON Modal
features.description: Add translations to DetailDrawer and JsonModal components. Replace mixed Chinese/English text with translation keys. Includes field labels, section titles, button text, and null state messages.
acceptance_criteria: Drawer title 'Log Detail' translated
All field labels (Request ID, Timestamp, Status, API Key ID, Model, Endpoint, etc.) translated
PII display (Yes, No, types found, Show/Hide details, Type breakdown) translated
Body sections (Request Body, Response Body) translated
Expand/collapse buttons (展开预览/收起) translated
Truncation warning translated
'View full content' button translated
Null messages (Content expired, Request blocked) translated
JSON Modal title and copy button translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Replace hardcoded Chinese strings with translation keys. Use nested keys like 'audit.detail.field.requestId', 'audit.detail.body.viewFull'.

features.title: Translate Security page
features.description: Add translations to SecurityPage including KPI cards, chart titles, table headers, and empty state messages.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'Security Monitor' translated
KPI labels (Blocked Requests, PII Detections, Injection Attempts, Content Filter) translated
KPI sub-labels (X types, avg score X%, X flagged, X allowed) translated
Chart titles (PII Detection by Type, Injection Score Distribution) translated
'Threat Feed' title and subtitle translated
Table headers (Time, Request ID, Model, PII, Injection Score) translated
Empty state messages translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations

features.title: Translate Providers page
features.description: Add translations to ProvidersPage including provider card labels, health status labels, and key count text.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'Providers' translated
'Default' badge translated
'keys' (singular/plural) translated
'avg' latency label translated
'Key Health' label translated
'Model Mappings' label translated
Table headers (Alias, Model) translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Use nested keys like 'providers.card.default', 'providers.card.keys'. Key strategy names (round-robin, random, least-latency) can stay as-is.

features.title: Translate Settings page
features.description: Add translations to SettingsPage including card titles, field labels, section headers, and empty state messages.
acceptance_criteria: Page title 'Settings' translated
Card titles (General, Security Rules, Retry Policy, Provider Config, TOML Preview) translated
All field labels (Port, Host, Log Level, Default RPM/TPM/RPD, etc.) translated
'Blocked PII Types' and 'Flagged PII Types' labels translated
'None' placeholder translated
'default' badge translated
'Base URL', 'Key Strategy', 'Key Count' labels translated
'Model Mappings' label translated
'No providers configured' message translated
'Loading...' message translated
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Use nested keys like 'settings.cards.general', 'settings.fields.port'. TOML preview title should be translated but content stays as-is.

features.title: Add Language Switcher component
features.description: Create a LanguageSwitcher component that allows users to toggle between English and Chinese. Add to Navbar. Persist language preference to localStorage.
acceptance_criteria: LanguageSwitcher component created with dropdown or toggle button
Shows current language (EN / 中文)
Clicking switches language immediately
Language preference persisted to localStorage
Component added to Navbar
Works with i18next instance
Both English and Chinese flag icons or labels
features.technical_notes: Use i18next's changeLanguage() method. Can use a simple dropdown or a toggle button. Consider using lucide-react Globe icon.

features.title: Translate StatusBadge and InjectionScoreBar
features.description: Add translations to StatusBadge and InjectionScoreBar components for status labels and tooltip text.
acceptance_criteria: StatusBadge labels (success, error, blocked) translated
InjectionScoreBar tooltip or labels translated if any
All strings have both English and Chinese translations
features.technical_notes: Check if InjectionScoreBar has any user-visible text. StatusBadge should map status values to translation keys.
